# Static Sag Test

**Summary**: A test to measure the settling of heavy particles in a fluid under static conditions.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-basfar|Basfar, 2023]] applied static sag tests in vertical and 45° inclined positions to evaluate barite stability.

## Key Results and Findings

- Determined that 50% ilmenite was adequate to prevent solids sag in WBM with a sag factor of 0.51. ([[2023-basfar|Basfar, 2023, p. 32]])
